implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for ATM: A bank client can have two types of accounts
The application should automatically withdraw funds from a related saving-account if the requested withdrawal amount on the checking-account is more than its current balance, en...
The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): A checking-account and a saving-account
The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): For each checking account, one related saving-account can exist, allowing for efficient account management and risk mitigation.
The system shall ensure sustainability (environmental impact awareness): The bank client must be able to deposit an amount to and withdraw an amount from his or her accounts usi...
